notes: Runs, but no audio. Make sure you don't press any keys when title screen is loading. It caused mine to crash repeatedly by doing that.
title: HeXen: Deathkings of the Dark Citadel

notes: Game runs great! I used to have issues running it!
title: HeXen: Deathkings of the Dark Citadel

notes: Runs perfectly out of the [dos]box. Could be made native easily by bundling it with Linux dosbox. Audio problem mentioned earlier is also present on Windows at times.
title: HeXen: Deathkings of the Dark Citadel

notes: Everything works fine. However, I recommend playing this game natively through the GZDoom source port instead. Since it is a Doom engine game, it will work fine. No need to play any Doom engine games through Proton when GZDoom has been native on Linux for years.
title: HeXen: Deathkings of the Dark Citadel
